name: TEMPUR SEALY INTL  DL-,01
summary: Tempur Sealy International, Inc. designs, manufactures, and distributes bedding products worldwide. The company offers mattresses, foundations, pillows, and other sleep-related products under the TEMPUR, Tempur-Pedic, Sealy, and Stearns & Foster brands. Tempur Sealy is headquartered in Lexington, Kentucky.
